decisions.title_en: Trump signs AI safety executive order seeking voluntary pre-release model review
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Trump signed an AI safety EO on 6-2 asking labs to voluntarily submit top models for up to 30 days of govt testing before release; also directs cyber-capability benchmarks and an AI cybersecurity clearinghouse. Marks a shift from the hands-off stance.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI 'Intelligence at Work': Codex everywhere in ChatGPT, six business plugins, Sites
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. At a 6-2 livestream OpenAI announced Codex inside the ChatGPT app everywhere, six business-focused Codex plugins (sales, data analytics, creative, product design, public-equity investing, investment banking), annotations for docs/sheets/slides, and Sites (Codex builds shareable web apps).

decisions.title_en: Microsoft unveils seven homegrown MAI models incl first reasoning model MAI-Thinking-1, plus Project Solara devices
decisions.reason: Published 6-2 as Project Polaris + Windows Agent Framework. New info: Suleyman revealed SEVEN in-house MAI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (Microsoft's first reasoning model, 35B params, matches Claude Opus 4.6 on coding, no distillation), MAI-Code-1, MAI-Image 2.5, MAI-Voice 2, MAI-Transcribe 1.5, and Project Solara agent-first concept devices (smart-clock + work badge). Distinct self-sufficiency push beyond Polaris/WAF.

decisions.title_en: Apollo + Blackstone syndicate record $36B chip-debt deal to buy Google TPUs for Anthropic
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Apollo and Blackstone arranging ~$36B private-credit/debt to buy custom Google TPUs that Anthropic leases; Broadcom backstops the largest tranches. Books open this week with pricing details emerging — would be the largest private-credit deal and biggest chip-financing debt transaction in history.

decisions.title_en: Qualcomm launches Dragonfly data-center chip brand at Computex; stock falls ~9%
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. At Computex (6-1) CEO Cristiano Amon declared 2026 the 'Year of the AI Agent' and launched Dragonfly, a dedicated data-center brand spanning CPUs, AI inference accelerators and ASICs — Qualcomm's formal data-center entry. No specs given (roadmap promised June 24 Investor Day); QCOM fell ~9%, overshadowed by Nvidia.

decisions.title_en: Tencent set to launch WeChat AI agent; shares jump
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. FT/Bloomberg (6-2): Tencent plans to begin a compliance process for a public launch of a WeChat AI agent as soon as this month; Tencent shares jumped on the report.
event_date 2026-04-02 is ~2 months old (>5 day limit). Surfaced in search but not new.
event_date 2026-02-10; ~4 months old. A misleading Crunchbase snippet implied 6-2, but the round closed in February.
